heading: Definitions and special rules
label: 1393 Definitions and special rules

children.label: A
children.text: the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development in the case of any nominated area which is located in an urban area, and

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary of Agriculture in the case of any nominated area which is located in a rural area.

children.label: A
children.text: outside of a metropolitan statistical area (within the meaning of section 143(k)(2)(B)), or

children.label: B
children.text: determined by the Secretary of Agriculture, after consultation with the Secretary of Commerce, to be a rural area.

children.heading: Urban area
children.label: 3 Urban area
children.text: The term “urban area” means an area which is not a rural area.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: No empowerment zone or enterprise community may include any area within an Indian reservation.

children.heading: Indian reservation defined
children.label: B Indian reservation defined
children.text: The term “Indian reservation” has the meaning given such term by section 168(j)(6).

children.label: A
children.text: any county, city, town, township, parish, village, or other general purpose political subdivision of a State, and

children.label: B
children.text: any combination of political subdivisions described in subparagraph (A) recognized by the appropriate Secretary.

children.heading: Nominated area
children.label: 6 Nominated area
children.text: The term “nominated area” means an area which is nominated by 1 or more local governments and the State or States in which it is located for designation under section 1391.

children.heading: Governments
children.label: 7 Governments
children.text: If more than 1 State or local government seeks to nominate an area under this part, any reference to, or requirement of, this subchapter shall apply to all such governments.

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: 8 Special rule
children.text: An area shall be treated as nominated by a State and a local government if it is nominated by an economic development corporation chartered by the State.

children.heading: Use of census data
children.label: 9 Use of census data
children.text: Population and poverty rate shall be determined by the most recent decennial census data available.

children.heading: Empowerment zone; enterprise community
children.label: b Empowerment zone; enterprise community
children.text: For purposes of this title, the terms “empowerment zone” and “enterprise community” mean areas designated as such under section 1391.
